In this work, we propose Feature-Informed Diffusion Evolution (FIDE), a fully black-box framework that requires no gradients or specific initialization: the renderer is treated as an opaque function whose only requirement is to produce images. Our key insight is feature guiding: rather than reducing each candidate rendering to a scalar loss value, we use a Vision Transformer (ViT) to extract dense visual features from it. We subsequently use these features to train a diffusion-based candidate proposal model, allowing the network to use visual cues to predict parameters that would match the target image. The candidate solutions proposed by this diffusion model are then refined in a closed loop with a CMA evolution strategy, continuously narrowing the proposal region as optimization progresses. We validate across diverse inverse problems from path tracing, vector splines, Voronoi shaders, and robotics, and demonstrate that feature-guiding substantially improves convergence over scalar-loss baselines and reliably escapes local minima where gradient-based methods stall.
papers.abstract_zh: 逆渲染传统上通过可微渲染器和梯度下降求解，这需要大量针对特定问题的工程处理，且由于歧义性容易陷入局部最小值。无导数方法减轻了工程需求，但通常严重依赖于良好的问题初始化。在这项工作中，我们提出了特征引导扩散进化（FIDE），一个完全黑盒框架，不需要梯度或特定初始化：渲染器被视为一个不透明函数，唯一要求是生成图像。我们的关键洞察是特征引导：不是将每个候选渲染简化为标量损失值，而是使用视觉变换器（ViT）从中提取密集视觉特征。随后，我们利用这些特征训练一个基于扩散的候选提议模型，使网络能够利用视觉线索预测与目标图像匹配的参数。该扩散模型提出的候选解随后与CMA进化策略在闭环中细化，随着优化进行不断缩小提议区域。我们在来自路径追踪、向量样条、Voronoi着色器和机器人的多种逆问题上进行验证，并证明特征引导在标量损失基线上显著提高了收敛性，并可靠地逃离了基于梯度方法停滞的局部最小值。

papers.title: Kernel Regression with Tensor Trains and Hadamard Overparameterization
papers.title_zh: 基于张量列与哈达玛过参数化的核回归
papers.abstract: Kernel regression with tensor trains and Hadamard overparameterization (KReTTaH) is introduced as a training-data-free, interpretable, and nonparametric framework for multi-way data imputation. The imputation problem is reformulated as regression in reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHS), where the tensor regression coefficients are explicitly constrained to lie on fixed-rank tensor-train (TT) manifolds and structured via Hadamard overparameterization to promote sparsity and high representational efficiency. Rather than relying on costly cross-validation, KReTTaH jointly optimizes the TT coefficient tensors and the kernel covariance matrices within a Riemannian product-manifold framework -- the former on fixed-rank TT manifolds, the latter on the manifold of positive-definite matrices -- thereby enabling automated kernel-hyperparameter selection. Numerical tests on two challenging applications -- imputation of high-dimensional functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data and recovery of missing edge flows in dynamic graphs -- demonstrate that KReTTaH consistently outperforms state-of-the-art tensor-, Bayesian-, and neural-network-based baselines in terms of modeling accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 引入基于张量列与哈达玛过参数化的核回归（KReTTaH），作为一种无需训练数据、可解释且非参数化的多路数据插补框架。该插补问题被重新表述为再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的回归问题，其中张量回归系数被显式约束在固定秩张量列（TT）流形上，并通过哈达玛过参数化进行结构化，以促进稀疏性和高表示效率。KReTTaH不依赖昂贵的交叉验证，而是在黎曼乘积流形框架内联合优化TT系数张量和核协方差矩阵——前者位于固定秩TT流形上，后者位于正定矩阵流形上——从而实现核超参数的自动选择。在两个具有挑战性的应用——高维功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据插补和动态图中缺失边流恢复——上的数值测试表明，KReTTaH在建模精度上始终优于基于张量、贝叶斯和神经网络的最先进基线方法。

papers.title: Team DACTYL at PAN 2026: Bayesian Data Mixing and Empirical X-risk Minimization for AI-text Detection
papers.title_zh: PAN 2026中的DACTYL团队：用于AI文本检测的贝叶斯数据混合与经验X风险最小化
papers.abstract: Existing research shows that AI-generated text detection classifiers achieve strong in-distribution (ID) performance but do not maintain the same performance on out-of-distribution (OOD) texts, suggesting overfitting to dataset-specific features. However, combining different training datasets doesn't always improve performance and, in some cases, can even encourage shortcut learning. To address this issue, we fine-tune BERT-tiny models with Bayesian classification heads to select texts across three different datasets to use as a consolidated training set. We trained three different classifiers: fine-tuned DeBERTa-V3-large and ModernBERT-large classifiers via empirical X-risk minimization, and an MCGrad model that calibrates the predictions from the ModernBERT-large classifier. The DeBERTa-V3-large-large classifier achieves a mean score of 0.882 on the PAN 2026 test set across five metrics: AUROC, $F_1$, C@1, Brier score, and $F_{0.5u}$. ModernBERT-large achieves a score of 0.96 while MCGrad achieves the best score of the three with a mean score of 0.974, ranking second on the leaderboard. Our results highlight that careful dataset curation can lead to strong OOD performance. We release our ModernBERT-large and DeBERTa-V3-large models at https://huggingface.co/collections/ShantanuT01/panclef-2026 .
papers.abstract_zh: 现有研究表明，AI生成文本检测分类器在分布内（ID）数据上表现强劲，但在分布外（OOD）文本上无法保持相同性能，这表明模型过度拟合了数据集特定特征。然而，组合不同的训练数据集并不总能提升性能，在某些情况下甚至可能鼓励捷径学习。为解决这一问题，我们使用贝叶斯分类头微调BERT-tiny模型，从三个不同数据集中选择文本以构建统一的训练集。我们训练了三个不同的分类器：通过经验X风险最小化微调的DeBERTa-V3-large和ModernBERT-large分类器，以及一个校准ModernBERT-large分类器预测的MCGrad模型。DeBERTa-V3-large分类器在PAN 2026测试集上，基于AUROC、$F_1$、C@1、Brier分数和$F_{0.5u}$五个指标的平均得分为0.882。ModernBERT-large得分为0.96，而MCGrad以平均分0.974获得三者中的最佳成绩，在排行榜上排名第二。我们的结果强调，精心策划的数据集可以带来强大的OOD性能。我们在https://huggingface.co/collections/ShantanuT01/panclef-2026 发布了我们的ModernBERT-large和DeBERTa-V3-large模型。

papers.title: Econometrics with Pre-Trained Embeddings for Unstructured Data
papers.title_zh: 基于预训练嵌入的非结构化数据计量经济学
papers.abstract: Unstructured data, such as images and text, are increasingly used in empirical economics. Since training machine-learning models on unstructured data is costly, economists often use off-the-shelf pre-trained deep learning models developed by computer scientists to extract embeddings, which are then used as covariates in target economic analyses. Despite the popularity of this practice, its theoretical foundations remain limited. There are two main difficulties. First, the pre-trained model is usually trained on a different dataset and for a different task. Consequently, it is unclear when such a model can be used reliably for the target task. Second, the embedding function is subject to an identification problem, which makes it difficult to analyze the estimation error of the embedding function and its effect on the target task. In this paper, we provide sufficient conditions to overcome these difficulties and derive the convergence rate of machine learning models with pre-trained embeddings. We illustrate the theory through double machine learning applications for estimating parameters of interest, such as partially linear regression with unstructured controls, price elasticity in demand estimation considering the product quality measured by images and text, missing data imputation with unstructured data, and the average treatment effect with unstructured confounders.
papers.abstract_zh: 非结构化数据（如图像和文本）在实证经济学中的应用日益广泛。由于在非结构化数据上训练机器学习模型成本高昂，经济学家通常使用计算机科学家开发的现成预训练深度学习模型来提取嵌入，然后将这些嵌入作为目标经济分析中的协变量。尽管这种做法很流行，但其理论基础仍然有限。主要存在两个困难。首先，预训练模型通常是在不同的数据集上为不同的任务训练的。因此，不清楚何时可以可靠地将此类模型用于目标任务。其次，嵌入函数存在识别问题，这使得分析嵌入函数的估计误差及其对目标任务的影响变得困难。在本文中，我们提供了克服这些困难的充分条件，并推导了具有预训练嵌入的机器学习模型的收敛速度。我们通过双重机器学习应用来说明该理论，用于估计感兴趣的参数，例如具有非结构化控制的部分线性回归、考虑图像和文本衡量的产品质量的需求估计中的价格弹性、非结构化数据的缺失数据插补以及具有非结构化混杂因素的平均处理效应。

papers.title: Chebyshev Manifold Adaptation
papers.title_zh: 切比雪夫流形适配
papers.abstract: The paper presents a new parameter-efficient adaptation method called ChebyMA (Chebyshev Manifold Adaptation). ChebyMA adopts weight matrices through a multi-surface superposition of Chebyshev polynomial bases evaluated on learnable coordinates and combined via trainable coefficient matrices, replacing standard linear projections with highly expressive continuous function approximation. Theoretically, we establish an Approximation Expressivity Theorem, proving from the perspective of function approximation theory that single-manifold ChebyMA guarantees convergence in Frobenius norm error of reconstruction. Besides, drawing on Kolmogorov $n$-width intuition, we demonstrate the expressive advantages of multi-manifold superposition ($S > 1$) in decoupling high-dimensional complex features. Experimental results on Computer Vision CIFAR datasets(CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100)\cite{CIFAR} and Natural Language Processing (AG News, SST-2) datasets demonstrate that ChebyMA consistently achieves a superior parameter-accuracy Pareto front compared to standard full-parameter fine-tuning, LoRA\cite{LoRA}, TLoRA\cite{TLoRA}, and StelLA\cite{StelLA}. ChebyMA significantly outperforms other tested methods in tested datasets, validating its solid theoretical foundation for generality with purely vectorized computations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的参数高效适配方法，称为ChebyMA（切比雪夫流形适配）。ChebyMA通过切比雪夫多项式基在可学习坐标上评估的多表面叠加，并结合可训练系数矩阵，采用权重矩阵，用高表达性的连续函数逼近替代标准线性投影。理论上，我们建立了一个逼近表达性定理，从函数逼近理论的角度证明单流形ChebyMA保证了重构的Frobenius范数误差收敛。此外，借鉴Kolmogorov n-宽度直觉，我们展示了多流形叠加（S > 1）在解耦高维复杂特征方面的表达优势。在计算机视觉CIFAR数据集（CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100）\cite{CIFAR}和自然语言处理（AG News, SST-2）数据集上的实验结果表明，与标准全参数微调、LoRA\cite{LoRA}、TLoRA\cite{TLoRA}和StelLA\cite{StelLA}相比，ChebyMA始终实现了更优的参数-精度帕累托前沿。ChebyMA在测试数据集上显著优于其他测试方法，验证了其基于纯向量化计算的通用性的坚实理论基础。

papers.title: Stringological sequence prediction II: Right-to-left automaticity and related complexity measures
papers.title_zh: 字符串序列预测II：从右到左自动性及相关复杂度度量
papers.abstract: In a previous paper, we began the study of sequence prediction algorithms adapted to stringological word complexity measures. One measure we considered was left-to-right (most-significant-digit-first) automaticity. Here, we show a statistically and computationally efficient algorithm adapted to the ``dual'' right-to-left (least-significant-digit-first) automaticity, which turns out to be substantially different for our purpose. We also demonstrate a prediction algorithm for a more expressive measure that we call ``arithmetic repetition complexity''. In particular, the latter can be used for predicting the so-called mix-automatic sequences.
papers.abstract_zh: 在之前的一篇论文中，我们开始了对适应于字符串词复杂度度量的序列预测算法的研究。我们考虑的一个度量是从左到右（最高有效数字优先）自动性。在这里，我们展示了一种适应于“对偶的”从右到左（最低有效数字优先）自动性的统计和计算高效的算法，结果证明这对我们的目的而言有显著不同。我们还展示了一种针对更具表达力的度量（我们称之为“算术重复复杂度”）的预测算法。特别地，后者可用于预测所谓的混合自动序列。

papers.title: From a Scalar to a Matrix Setting for the Dai--Liao Parameter
papers.title_zh: 从标量到矩阵：Dai-Liao参数的设置
papers.abstract: As is well known, both the numerical performance and the theoretical properties of the Dai--Liao conjugate gradient algorithm are highly dependent on the adjustment of its key parameter. Here, we first employ the well-known Harmonic--Geometric--Arithmetic--Quadratic mean inequality to reinforce the optimality of two previously proposed scalar adaptive settings of the Dai--Liao parameter. In other words, we show how these parameter choices are capable of enhancing the well-conditioning of the Dai--Liao search direction matrix by shrinking the intervals containing its singular values. A similar analysis is also carried out for scaled memoryless quasi--Newton updating formulas in order to further justify the optimality of two classical scaling parameters associated with these updates. Then, as the main contribution of this work, we move from the classical scalar setting of the Dai--Liao parameter to a matrix setting aimed at enhancing flexibility and diversity within optimization methods. In particular, we show that, under such a matrix formulation of the parameter, a well-known three-term conjugate gradient algorithm emerges as a member of the proposed extended Dai--Liao class of algorithms while enjoying several computationally attractive properties. Among these, the well-conditioning of the associated search direction matrix is especially noteworthy, as well as the ability to make more explicit use of the second-order information of the model. Finally, to provide practical evidence supporting the proposed matrix setting of the Dai--Liao parameter, we conduct a series of numerical experiments on standard benchmark test problems and report the results in detail. Generally speaking, the proposed framework is shown to retain both theoretical soundness and computational reliability.
papers.abstract_zh: 众所周知，Dai-Liao共轭梯度算法的数值性能和理论性质高度依赖于其关键参数的调整。本文首先利用著名的调和-几何-算术-平方平均不等式来强化先前提出的两种Dai-Liao参数标量自适应设置的最优性。换言之，我们展示了这些参数选择如何通过收缩包含其奇异值的区间来增强Dai-Liao搜索方向矩阵的良好条件性。类似的分析也应用于缩放的无记忆拟牛顿更新公式，以进一步证明与这些更新相关的两个经典缩放参数的最优性。然后，作为本文的主要贡献，我们从经典的Dai-Liao参数标量设置转向矩阵设置，旨在增强优化方法的灵活性和多样性。特别地，我们表明，在这种参数矩阵公式下，一个著名的三项共轭梯度算法作为所提出的扩展Dai-Liao算法类的一员出现，同时具有若干计算上吸引人的性质。其中，相关搜索方向矩阵的良好条件性尤为值得注意，以及更显式地利用模型的二阶信息的能力。最后，为了提供支持所提出的Dai-Liao参数矩阵设置的实际证据，我们在标准基准测试问题上进行了一系列数值实验，并详细报告了结果。总体而言，所提出的框架被证明既保持了理论上的合理性，又具有计算上的可靠性。

papers.title: When Drift Detectors cry Wolf: False Alarm Rates in continuous ML Monitoring
papers.title_zh: 当漂移探测器狼来了：持续机器学习监控中的误报率
papers.abstract: Drift detection is a core component of production machine learning monitoring systems, where detectors are used to compare incoming data with a reference distribution and trigger alerts when changes occur. However, these detectors are often evaluated in research settings that emphasize detection accuracy under synthetic shifts, while overlooking false alarms under continuous monitoring. In production environments, models are monitored repeatedly over time and across many features, and even small false positive rates can accumulate into frequent alerts, leading to alarm fatigue. We empirically analyze false positive behavior across five commonly used drift detectors: PSI, KS, MMD, LSDD, and adversarial validation. Consistent with existing literature, PSI exhibits strong sensitivity to batch size, producing frequent false alarms at small sample sizes; however, we further observe that its behavior stabilizes and improves substantially once batch sizes exceed approximately 200 samples. In contrast, KS, MMD, and LSDD display persistent fluctuations across batch sizes, while remaining comparatively more reliable than PSI in low-data regimes. Applying a Bonferroni correction reduces false positive rates, but often at the cost of reduced true positive sensitivity, reinforcing the well-known stability - sensitivity trade-off in drift detection. This work provides a systematic comparison of false positive behavior across multiple drift detectors under continuous monitoring conditions. We identify tradeoffs across detector families and provide practical guidelines for selecting and calibrating drift detectors in production ML systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 漂移检测是生产机器学习监控系统的核心组成部分，其中探测器用于将传入数据与参考分布进行比较，并在发生变化时触发警报。然而，这些探测器通常在强调合成偏移下检测准确性的研究环境中进行评估，而忽略了持续监控下的误报。在生产环境中，模型会随时间反复监控，涉及许多特征，即使很小的假阳性率也可能累积成频繁的警报，导致警报疲劳。我们通过实验分析了五种常用漂移探测器（PSI、KS、MMD、LSDD和对抗验证）的假阳性行为。与现有文献一致，PSI对批次大小表现出强烈的敏感性，在小样本量下产生频繁的误报；然而，我们进一步观察到，一旦批次大小超过约200个样本，其行为会稳定并显著改善。相比之下，KS、MMD和LSDD在不同批次大小下表现出持续的波动，但在低数据情况下相对比PSI更可靠。应用Bonferroni校正可降低假阳性率，但通常以降低真阳性敏感性为代价，这强化了漂移检测中众所周知的稳定性-敏感性权衡。这项工作提供了在持续监控条件下多个漂移探测器假阳性行为的系统比较。我们识别了不同探测器家族之间的权衡，并为在生产ML系统中选择和校准漂移探测器提供了实用指南。

papers.title: Interpreting Quantum Learning Models via Stochastic Processes
papers.title_zh: 通过随机过程解释量子学习模型
papers.abstract: Quantum machine learning models define probabilistic input--output maps through coherent quantum evolution and measurement. While such models can exhibit computational advantages, their internal functioning and decision making generally resists interpretation in terms of stochastic trajectories through intermediate configurations. In contrast to classical (Markovian) stochastic processes, quantum dynamics generically violates the Chapman--Kolmogorov divisibility condition, preventing a decomposition into probabilistically meaningful intermediate transitions. We develop a probabilistic framework for representing quantum learning models as stochastic processes over configuration spaces where the dynamics are modeled as linear maps on probability distributions. Starting from a fixed POVM, arbitrary quantum channels induce transition kernels on the associated probability representation. For informationally complete POVMs, and in particular SIC-POVMs, these kernels are Markovian but generally quasi-stochastic, with non-classicality appearing as negativity. By contrast, projective spaces admit positive stochastic kernels but generally require non-Markovian dynamics due to the failure of Chapman--Kolmogorov divisibility. This yields a trade-off between negativity and dependence on past configurations, i.e. quantum dynamics can be represented either by Markovian quasi-stochastic maps or by positive stochastic processes with higher Markov order. We discuss how such representations of quantum dynamics can be interpreted as stochastic walks through a memory space in the spirit of Projective Simulation, a model of learning and agency in which decisions arise from random walks over an episodic memory network. We further outline how finite-order stochastic kernels can approximate such quantum deliberation processes and show in what regimes the classical machine learning model is recovered.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习模型通过相干量子演化和测量定义概率性的输入-输出映射。虽然此类模型可以展现计算优势，但其内部运作和决策通常难以通过中间构型的随机轨迹来解释。与经典（马尔可夫）随机过程不同，量子动力学通常违反Chapman-Kolmogorov可分割性条件，从而阻止了分解为概率上有意义的中间跃迁。我们开发了一个概率框架，将量子学习模型表示为构型空间上的随机过程，其中动力学被建模为概率分布上的线性映射。从固定的POVM出发，任意量子通道在相应的概率表示上诱导出跃迁核。对于信息完备的POVM，特别是SIC-POVM，这些核是马尔可夫的，但通常是准随机的，非经典性表现为负值。相比之下，投影空间允许正的随机核，但由于Chapman-Kolmogorov可分割性的失效，通常需要非马尔可夫动力学。这导致了负性与对过去构型依赖之间的权衡，即量子动力学可以表示为马尔可夫准随机映射，或具有更高马尔可夫阶的正随机过程。我们讨论了如何将这种量子动力学的表示解释为通过记忆空间的随机游走，这符合投影模拟的精神——一种学习和代理模型，其中决策源于对情景记忆网络的随机游走。我们进一步概述了有限阶随机核如何近似这种量子审议过程，并展示了在何种情况下经典机器学习模型得以恢复。

papers.title: Rationalizing Boltzmann Rationality: An Axiomatic Characterization of Entropy-Regularized Policies
papers.title_zh: 理性化玻尔兹曼理性：熵正则化策略的公理刻画
papers.abstract: The softmax policy $π(a \mid s) \propto \exp(βQ(s,a))$ is the default model of stochastic choice in reinforcement learning (RL). Various justifications based on robustness, exploration, and optimization have been offered in the RL literature, but none uniquely derives the softmax form from first principles. This leaves a basic tension unresolved: the entropy bonus in the soft Bellman equation violates the Independence axiom that underwrites the Markov decision process (MDP) reward structure. We dissolve this tension by distinguishing two kinds of randomness: chance and choice. By restricting von Neumann-Morgenstern (VNM) Independence to environmental lotteries over base prospects, we show that imposing independence of irrelevant alternatives (IIA) and monotonicity on the policy and value functions at choice nodes uniquely determines the Boltzmann policy, the entropy-regularized representation, and the soft Bellman equation. The choice between the soft and hard Bellman equations thus reduces to a design decision: whether the agent values its own ability to choose. We develop RL-specific consequences, including return monotonicity and convergence under generalized discounting, and synthesize the independent lines from economics and information theory that arrive at the same structure, offering a normative assessment of when IIA is appropriate for agent design.
papers.abstract_zh: softmax策略 $π(a \mid s) \propto \exp(βQ(s,a))$ 是强化学习（RL）中随机选择的默认模型。RL文献中提供了基于鲁棒性、探索和优化的各种理由，但没有一个能从第一性原理唯一推导出softmax形式。这留下了一个基本的张力未解决：软贝尔曼方程中的熵奖励违反了支撑马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）奖励结构的独立性公理。我们通过区分两种随机性——机会和选择——来消解这一张力。通过将冯·诺依曼-摩根斯坦（VNM）独立性限制在基础前景的环境抽签上，我们证明在决策节点上对策略和值函数施加无关选项独立性（IIA）和单调性唯一确定了玻尔兹曼策略、熵正则化表示和软贝尔曼方程。因此，软和硬贝尔曼方程之间的选择简化为一个设计决策：智能体是否重视自身选择能力。我们发展了RL特定的后果，包括在广义折扣下的回报单调性和收敛性，并综合了经济学和信息论中得出相同结构的独立路线，提供了关于IIA何时适用于智能体设计的规范性评估。
